issues.title: Enemy dealt 32 dmg (55% of 58 HP) on floor 3 enc 2
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 13 (seq 270), the enemy dealt 32 damage which is 55% of the player's 58 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for this enemy type.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 22 dmg (100% of 22 HP) on floor 3 enc 2
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 15 (seq 278), the enemy dealt 22 damage which is 100% of the player's 22 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for this enemy type.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 by knowledge_golem (boss)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 against knowledge_golem (boss). Accuracy was 52% over 15 turns. They dealt 59 damage and took 137 damage. Early defeat suggests difficulty may be too high for this profile.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing boss HP or damage for early floors.

issues.title: Floor 3 enc 2: 15 turns vs prev floor avg 6.0 (2.5x)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 3 (enemy: knowledge_golem, boss) took 15 turns to resolve, which is 2.5x the previous floor's average of 6.0 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold and indicates a difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floors or reduce this enemy's HP/damage.

issues.title: HP dropped from 81 to 13 in floor 3 encounter 2
issues.description: During floor 3, encounter 2, player HP dropped from 81 to 13. Going from >70 to <20 in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.
issues.suggestedFix: Add damage caps per encounter or provide emergency healing at low HP.
